metadata.description: Domain knowledge skills for operating Pignal websites with AI agents. 28 plugins covering all 24 templates plus platform operations, SEO, content ops, and forms.

plugins.name: pignal-platform
plugins.description: Core Pignal platform operations — create, manage, deploy, and monitor sites via MCP. Use when managing site lifecycle, checking health, deploying updates, or configuring any Pignal site.

plugins.name: pignal-seo
plugins.description: Cross-template SEO optimization — on-page SEO principles, structured data, JSON-LD, meta tags, llms.txt, and content auditing for any Pignal site.

plugins.name: pignal-content-ops
plugins.description: Content quality review, validation workflows, and publishing gates. Use when reviewing, moderating, or bulk-managing content across any Pignal site.

plugins.name: pignal-forms
plugins.description: Site actions and lead capture — create forms, CTAs, manage submissions, configure webhooks. Works with any Pignal template's form system.

plugins.name: pignal-blogger
plugins.description: Expert blogging craft for Pignal Blog/Signals sites. Editorial workflow, writing structure, tagging strategy, content planning, and article SEO. Use when writing blog posts, creating articles, or operating a blog site.

plugins.name: pignal-wiki
plugins.description: Technical documentation craft for Pignal Wiki sites. Information architecture, docs-as-code methodology, cross-referencing, and the Diataxis framework. Use when writing docs, organizing knowledge bases, or creating reference material.

plugins.name: pignal-til
plugins.description: Micro-knowledge capture for Pignal TIL sites. Concise entry format, atomic ideas, daily grouping, and knowledge compression. Use for quick learnings, micro-blogging, or daily TIL entries.

plugins.name: pignal-glossary
plugins.description: Terminology and reference craft for Pignal Glossary sites. Clear definitions, alphabetical organization, cross-referencing, and lexicography principles. Use when defining terms or building reference tables.

plugins.name: pignal-magazine
plugins.description: News and editorial craft for Pignal Magazine sites. Inverted pyramid structure, headline writing, lede construction, and news value hierarchy. Use when writing news articles, feature stories, or editorial content.

plugins.name: pignal-reviews
plugins.description: Critical assessment craft for Pignal Review sites. Balanced evaluation methodology, rating criteria, pros/cons structure, and comparison frameworks. Use when writing reviews, ratings, or product comparisons.

plugins.name: pignal-podcast
plugins.description: Podcasting craft for Pignal Podcast sites. Show notes structure, episode management, guest attribution, and series planning. Use when managing podcast episodes or creating show notes.

plugins.name: pignal-shop
plugins.description: E-commerce craft for Pignal Shop sites. Product copywriting, pricing psychology, inventory management, collection strategy, and product SEO. Use when creating product listings, managing inventory, or optimizing shop content.

plugins.name: pignal-menu
plugins.description: Menu engineering for Pignal Menu sites. Menu psychology, pricing display, section organization, and food description writing. Use when creating menus, price lists, or food/drink catalogs.

plugins.name: pignal-services
plugins.description: Service marketing craft for Pignal Service Directory sites. Service positioning, tier design, availability communication, and value differentiation. Use when listing services, creating pricing tiers, or managing service offerings.

plugins.name: pignal-recipes
plugins.description: Recipe writing craft for Pignal Recipe sites. Structured instructions, ingredient formatting, time calculations, and recipe SEO. Use when writing recipes, formatting cooking instructions, or managing a recipe collection.

plugins.name: pignal-journal
plugins.description: Reflective writing craft for Pignal Journal sites. Journaling techniques, reflection prompts, daily practice, and personal narrative. Use when writing diary entries, daily reflections, or personal journal posts.

plugins.name: pignal-bookshelf
plugins.description: Book review craft for Pignal Bookshelf sites. Review methodology, reading status tracking, and collection organization. Use when reviewing books, tracking reading progress, or managing a reading list.

plugins.name: pignal-changelog
plugins.description: Release communication craft for Pignal Changelog sites. Keep a Changelog conventions, semver principles, and audience-appropriate release notes. Use when writing changelogs, release notes, or documenting software updates.

plugins.name: pignal-runbook
plugins.description: Procedural writing craft for Pignal Runbook sites. SOP methodology, step-by-step instructions, escalation paths, and verification steps. Use when creating runbooks, SOPs, or operational procedures.

plugins.name: pignal-incidents
plugins.description: Incident communication craft for Pignal Incident Log sites. Severity classification, timeline construction, root cause analysis, and blameless postmortem methodology. Use when documenting incidents, writing postmortems, or managing incident logs.

plugins.name: pignal-portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio presentation craft for Pignal Portfolio sites. Project storytelling, visual hierarchy, impact quantification, and portfolio sequencing. Use when showcasing projects, creating portfolio entries, or presenting creative work.

plugins.name: pignal-writing
plugins.description: Creative writing craft for Pignal Writing sites. Narrative structure, storytelling techniques, dialogue, pacing, and voice. Use when writing fiction, creative non-fiction, essays, or long-form narrative content.

plugins.name: pignal-course
plugins.description: Instructional design craft for Pignal Course sites. Bloom's taxonomy, learning objectives, lesson sequencing, and scaffolding. Use when creating tutorials, courses, lessons, or educational content.

plugins.name: pignal-flashcards
plugins.description: Knowledge testing craft for Pignal Flashcard sites. Effective Q&A design, spaced repetition principles, and multi-level questioning. Use when creating study cards, quiz questions, or knowledge assessments.

plugins.name: pignal-directory
plugins.description: Resource curation craft for Pignal Directory sites. Resource evaluation, category design, status tracking, and description writing for links. Use when curating resources, organizing directories, or managing link collections.

plugins.name: pignal-awesome
plugins.description: Awesome-list curation craft for Pignal Curated List sites. GitHub awesome-list standards, inclusion criteria, and community curation. Use when building curated lists, awesome-lists, or link collections.

plugins.name: pignal-case-studies
plugins.description: Case study methodology for Pignal Case Study sites. Outcome storytelling, metric selection, before/after framing, and client voice integration. Use when writing case studies, documenting project outcomes, or presenting client work.

plugins.name: pignal-resume
plugins.description: Career branding craft for Pignal Resume sites. Achievement-driven writing, impact quantification, experience narrative, and professional positioning. Use when creating resumes, CVs, or professional profiles.
